29624.title: The Political Economy of Anti-Bribery Enforcement
29624.zh_title: 反贿赂执法的政治经济学
29624.abstract: This paper documents novel evidence on the influence of political incentives in the regulatory enforcement of foreign bribery. Using exogenous variation in the timing and geographic location of U.S. Congressional elections, we find that the probability of a Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) enforcement action against foreign firms located in the Senator’s jurisdiction increases significantly pre-election, spiking 23%, with zero equivalent move for equivalently global (but domestic-headquartered) firms in the Senator’s jurisdiction. Using hand-collected case-level data from the U.S. SEC and DOJ, we also observe larger discretion in regions where foreign firms are larger global competitors of in-state firms, operate in locally important industries, and when Senators serve as the Chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee (which oversees the DOJ). Anti-bribery enforcement has electoral implications, leading to spikes in media coverage of the FCPA enforcement coupled with greater vote shares for the Senator. Moreover, the cases pushed through against these foreign firms just prior to elections appear to be weaker cases. The enforcements result in real effects, as in response to strategic timing in enforcement, firms reallocate business segments and sales.
29624.zh_abstract: 本文记录了政治激励对外国贿赂监管执法影响的新证据。利用美国国会选举时间和地理区位的外生变化，我们发现，针对参议员管辖区域内外国公司的《反海外腐败法》执法行动概率在选举前显著增加，峰值达到23%，而对同样全球运营但总部位于该参议员管辖区域内的本土公司则没有相应变化。利用从美国证券交易委员会和司法部手工收集的案件层面数据，我们还观察到，在外国公司是州内公司更大全球竞争对手、在地方重要行业运营以及参议员担任参议院司法委员会主席（该委员会监督司法部）的情况下，执法裁量权更大。反贿赂执法具有选举影响，导致媒体对《反海外腐败法》执法的报道激增，同时参议员获得的选票份额增加。此外，在选举前针对这些外国公司推进的案件似乎证据较弱。这些执法产生了实际影响，作为对执法时机策略的回应，公司重新调整了业务部门和销售布局。
29624.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ITI, LE, POL；JEL：F13, F14, F36, F53, F55, F65, G28, G38, K22, K33, K42

29625.title: Using Bid Rotation and Incumbency to Detect Collusion: A Regression Discontinuity Approach
29625.zh_title: 利用投标轮换和现任优势检测合谋：一种断点回归方法
29625.authors: Kei Kawai, Jun Nakabayashi, Juan M. Ortner, Sylvain Chassang
29625.abstract: Cartels participating in procurement auctions frequently use bid rotation or prioritize incumbents to allocate contracts. However, establishing a link between observed allocation patterns and firm conduct has been difficult: there are cost-based competitive explanations for such patterns. We show that by focusing on auctions in which the winning and losing bids are very close, it is possible to distinguish allocation patterns reflecting cost differences across firms from patterns reflecting non-competitive environments. We apply our tests to two datasets: the sample of Ohio milk auctions studied in Porter and Zona (1999), and a sample of municipal procurement auctions from Japan.
29625.zh_abstract: 参与采购拍卖的卡特尔经常使用投标轮换或优先考虑现任者来分配合同。然而，在观察到的分配模式与企业行为之间建立联系一直很困难：因为存在基于成本的竞争性解释可以说明此类模式。我们表明，通过关注胜出和失败投标非常接近的拍卖，可以区分反映企业间成本差异的分配模式与反映非竞争环境的分配模式。我们将我们的检验应用于两个数据集：Porter和Zona（1999）研究的俄亥俄州牛奶拍卖样本，以及来自日本的市政采购拍卖样本。

29661.title: Health Insurance for Whom? The ‘Spill-up’ Effects of Children’s Health Insurance on Mothers
29661.zh_title: 为谁提供健康保险？儿童健康保险对母亲的“向上溢出”效应
29661.authors: Daniel S. Grossman, Sebastian Tello-Trillo, Barton Willage
29661.abstract: A rich literature documents the benefits of social safety net programs for children. This paper focuses on an unexplored margin: how children’s programs impact parents’ well-being. We explore changes in children’s public health insurance and its effects on parents’ economic and behavioral outcomes. Using a simulated eligibility for Medicaid eligibility expansions in the 1980s and 1990s, we isolate variation in children’s Medicaid eligibility due to changes in government policies. We find that increases in children’s Medicaid eligibility increases the likelihood a mother is married, decreases her labor market participation, and reduces her smoking and alcohol consumption. Our findings suggest improved maternal well-being as measured by the Center for Epidemiological Studies-Depression score, a proxy for mental health. These results uncover a new link that provides an important mechanism, parental well-being, for interpreting the literature’s findings on the long-term, short-term, and intergenerational effects of Medicaid coverage.
29661.zh_abstract: 大量文献记录了社会安全网项目对儿童的益处。本文关注一个尚未被探索的方面：儿童项目如何影响父母的福祉。我们探讨了儿童公共健康保险的变化及其对父母经济和行为结果的影响。利用20世纪80年代和90年代医疗补助资格扩展的模拟资格，我们分离出因政府政策变化导致的儿童医疗补助资格变动。我们发现，儿童医疗补助资格的增加提高了母亲已婚的可能性，降低了她的劳动市场参与率，并减少了她的吸烟和饮酒行为。我们的研究结果表明，以流行病学研究中心抑郁量表得分（心理健康代理指标）衡量的母亲福祉有所改善。这些结果揭示了一个新的联系，为解释文献中关于医疗补助覆盖的长期、短期和代际效应的发现提供了重要机制——父母福祉。
29661.meta: Programs：CH, EH；JEL：I1, I13, I14, I18, J10, J12, J18, J20, J21, J22

29691.title: Two-Way Fixed Effects and Differences-in-Differences with Heterogeneous Treatment Effects: A Survey
29691.zh_title: 双向固定效应与异质性处理效应下的双重差分法：一项综述
29691.abstract: Linear regressions with period and group fixed effects are widely used to estimate policies' effects: 26 of the 100 most cited papers published by the American Economic Review from 2015 to 2019 estimate such regressions. It has recently been show that those regressions may produce misleading estimates, if the policy's effect is heterogeneous between groups or over time, as is often the case. This survey reviews a fast-growing literature that documents this issue, and that proposes alternative estimators robust to heterogeneous effects.
29691.zh_abstract: 带有时期和组别固定效应的线性回归被广泛用于估计政策效果：在2015年至2019年《美国经济评论》发表的100篇被引次数最高的论文中，有26篇使用了此类回归。近期研究表明，如果政策效应在组间或时间上存在异质性（这通常是常见情况），这些回归可能会产生误导性估计。本综述回顾了快速增长的文献，这些文献记录了这一问题，并提出了对异质性效应具有稳健性的替代估计方法。
29691.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, ED, EEE, EH, ITI, LS, PE, POL, TWP；JEL：C21, C23
